mapper.select: SELECT * FROM contributors WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) AND LOWER(role) = LOWER(#{role}) LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM contributors WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM contributors WHERE slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contributors (name, slug, role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{slug}, #{role}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO book_contributors (book_id, contributor_id, role) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{contributorId}, #{role}) ON CONFLICT (book_id, contributor_id, role) DO NOTHING
